description: Retire the test-protection triad (M7, clean removal): remove captureHashes/tests-untouched/restoreOnRetry from the schema, loader, FileHashCapture capture-into-fragment path, RetryPolicy tests-untouched feedback, and CapturedFileStore (or retain only the byte-store the enforcer reuses); delete SSOT §3.1/§3.1.1; regenerate 04-dogfood-cost-cap to the writeScope pattern. #48 single-writer-per-key stays untouched
